name: slidelang
description: Create and publish presentation decks using the SlideLang DSL — a compact, agent-friendly slide authoring system with layout validation, image generation, and hosted publishing.

interface.shortDescription: Create and revise presentation decks with SlideLang.
interface.longDescription: Create, revise, validate, and publish presentation decks using the SlideLang DSL and hosted thin-client workflow.
defaultPrompt: Create a deck about reinforcement learning for a university audience.
Revise an existing SlideLang deck and republish it.
Fix layout issues in a SlideLang deck until it publishes cleanly.
